title: CSS Subgrid
description: Test your knowledge of CSS subgrid, which allows child grids to inherit their parent's grid tracks
referenceSolutions: grid-template-columns: subgrid inherits parent grid tracks

validationRules.message: Select the correct answer about CSS subgrid

hints.text: Subgrid is a value for grid-template-rows or grid-template-columns. It makes a nested grid use its parent's track sizing.
With 'grid-template-columns: subgrid', the child grid items align to the parent's column tracks instead of defining their own.
Subgrid inherits track definitions from the parent grid. A child with display: grid; grid-template-columns: subgrid; will align its items to the parent's columns within the area it spans.
